basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Hyderabad is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow with M.Tech qualification in Civil/Water Resources/Hydrology or allied areas. Last date: 16 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job description: Perform laboratory column and lysimeter experiments, data analysis, mathematical modelling of nanoatrazine transport, report writing, and project management
qualification.education_qualification: First class B.Tech/B.E. in Civil/Water Resources/Chemical/allied areas AND First class M.Tech/M.E. in Hydraulics/Water Resources/Hydrology/Hydrogeology/Chemical/Environmental/Earth Sciences/Agriculture/allied areas

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirement. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for online interview. Selected candidate is expected to join immediately. Opportunity to enroll for Ph.D. (subject to performance and institute norms).
how_to_apply: Eligible applicants should send the following documents via email to [email protected] with subject “JRF DST”: Latest CV with photograph Scanned copies of degree certificates and transcripts Proof of date of birth Statement of Purpose Contact details of two referees
Scanned copies of degree certificates and transcripts
important_instructions: Position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial appointment for 3 months, extendable based on performance. No hard copy required; only email application. Selected candidate must join immediately.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Hyderabad is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow with M.Tech qualification in Civil/Water Resources/Hydrology or allied areas. Last date: 16 July 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_hyderabad: Fate and transport of nanoatrazine in soil and its implication on soil-plant interaction: Laboratory and field investigations

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: First class B.Tech/B.E. in Civil/Water Resources/Chemical/allied areas AND First class M.Tech/M.E. in Hydraulics/Water Resources/Hydrology/Hydrogeology/Chemical/Environmental/Earth Sciences/Agriculture/allied areas
Strong mathematical, analytical, and programming skills; Previous experience in studying flow and transport through porous media
Perform laboratory column and lysimeter experiments, data analysis, mathematical modelling of nanoatrazine transport, report writing, and project management

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirement. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for online interview. Selected candidate is expected to join immediately. Opportunity to enroll for Ph.D. (subject to performance and institute norms).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible applicants should send the following documents via email to [email protected] with subject “JRF DST”: Latest CV with photograph Scanned copies of degree certificates and transcripts Proof of date of birth Statement of Purpose Contact details of two referees

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial appointment for 3 months, extendable based on performance. No hard copy required; only email application. Selected candidate must join immediately.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Hyderabad JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the fellowship amount for JRF at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA (Years 1-2) and Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA (Year 3).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Hyderabad Nanoatrazine JRF position?
faq.answer: First class B.Tech and M.Tech in Civil/Water Resources/Hydrology/Chemical/Environmental or allied areas.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for IIT Hyderabad Civil Engineering JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: Send required documents via email to [email protected] with subject “JRF DST”.

faq.question: Q5. Is Ph.D. opportunity available for selected JRF at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an option to enroll for Ph.D. in the same project based on performance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Hyderabad JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. What skills are required for IIT Hyderabad JRF in Contaminant Transport?
faq.answer: Strong mathematical, analytical, programming skills and experience in flow and transport through porous media.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration for IIT Hyderabad ANRF JRF position?
faq.answer: Up to 3 years, with initial appointment for 3 months (renewable).

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Principal Investigator for IIT Hyderabad JRF project?
faq.answer: Dr. Seetha N., Associate Professor, Department of Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q10. What experiments will the JRF perform at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Laboratory column experiments, lysimeter experiments, mathematical modelling, and field investigations.
